excluded: a claim that PhaseWrap-RoPE replaces RoPE
a claim that support-binding supervision is full transformer-scale validation
a claim that training-time structural teachers are positional-method promotion evidence by themselves
supported: A no-credential support-complete length-curriculum three-block pointer-generator audit with direct support-to-token binding supervision.
Evidence about whether a training-only support-weighted copy binding objective transfers into free evaluation without structural copy routing.

decision.claim_boundary: Support-binding teacher supervision preserves capacity but does not repair free held-out retrieval generalization.

model.row_policy: train one same-seed model per method on all support-complete Stage10 task train rows plus length-40 curriculum rows; evaluate unchanged original test splits separately
model.support_binding_policy: support-weighted copied-token binding loss is applied to phase-cued train rows only; validation and test use the free learned pointer-generator distribution
model.support_supervision_policy: support-class auxiliary loss is applied to phase-cued train rows only; evaluation does not receive support labels
model.target_attention_supervision_policy: target-position attention auxiliary loss is applied to retrieval train rows only; evaluation does not receive target_pos, target_delta, or reference_delta
model.teacher_distillation_policy: Stage88 structural copied-token teacher distributions are used on retrieval train rows only; validation and test evaluate the free learned pointer-generator distribution without structural routing
model.trained_parameters: token embeddings, three q/k/v/o attention blocks, vocab output projection, positional scale, copy/vocab gate, support classifier from decoder query state
model.value_output_mode: learned mixture of vocab softmax and copied prefix-token mass

source_rows: stage10 original rows with support-complete same-seed multitask training plus length-40 curriculum rows
